summary: TrackCenter initial candidate r01 from image145844 before spectroscopy.
scientific_rationale: The initial SavedImages artifact was exported with an explicit ImageData_YXZ axis contract and kcps units. The brightest separated candidate in the max-Z projection is r01 at x=114.375, y=117.750, z=116.000 um, peak 38.2 kcps with about 34.0 kcps local excess above background. Tracking this seed tests whether it is a usable single NV-like confocal emitter before spending spectroscopy time.
expected_evidence: track_center_v1 terminal result with final position and final kcps
final kcps above the standalone minimum_final_kcps gate of 8 kcps
tracking motion small enough to maintain continuous provenance from the image seed
success_criteria: no hardware, count-collapse, or branch-switch anomaly is reported
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
TrackCenter fails or final counts collapse below gate
hardware or stage-motion safety uncertainty appears
bridge_action: queue standalone track_center_v1 execute job via enqueue_nv_imaging_direct.py

result.summary: TrackCenter completed for image145844 r01 with final_counts_kcps=38.629 and tracked_position_um=[114.5574352635996,118.0608761933827,116.2597907479464].
